name: ccc-operations
description: CCC internal operations toolkit. Three skills: CCC SOP Creator (builds and updates Standard Operating Procedures in the HEROIC format for any repeatable CCC business process — outreach, delivery, internal workflows), Skill Creator Pro (engineering loop for creating, improving, and evaluating Claude skills and plugins to production quality — includes CCC publishing workflow), and Second Brain (sets up and audits Obsidian knowledge systems using the Three Brains framework). Use these skills to build and improve CCC's own systems.
